title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 544.430 - Who may be bound by recognizance
text:
544.430.  Who may be bound by recognizance. — Infants and married women shall be deemed capable, in law, of binding themselves by recognizance for their appearance and attendance, as specified in section 544.420, in like manner and with like effect as other persons.
(RSMo 1939 § 3874) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3484; 1919 § 3829; 1909 § 5037
